title: Metro Cash & Carry Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Metro Cash & Carry Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Cash & Carry Capital India:
Metro Cash & Carry Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India!
